growth_records.snippet: Table 3: Clostridium aceticum qCO,max=-39 mmol/(gx.h), Ks,CO=0.00025 mmol/L, KI,CO=0.07 mmol/L; Source Mayer et al. (2018).
growth_records.notes: qCO,max (maximum specific CO uptake) = -39 mmol_CO/(gx.h); Ks,CO=0.00025 mmol_CO/L; KI,CO=0.07 mmol_CO/L. Cited FROM Mayer et al. (2018) (review Table 3). C. aceticum value recalculated from qAcT,max via Eq.3 (Table 3 footnote a). Culture conditions (T, pH, medium, mode) not restated in this review.
